creator: aluuu@husa.su
text:
I found the same typo in the .po file in the same directory[1]. However, changing it had no effect on the `en` version of the handbook. Is this intentional? Should I fix this one too for consistency?

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/tree/documentation/content/en/books/handbook/multimedia/_index.po#n978

Best regards,
Aleksandr.
